item.title: BASW CPD Reflection
item.description:
tags: [] Placeholder for BASW Continuing Professional Development reflection to be added in approximately 18 months.

This reflection will detail my CPD activities, learning outcomes, and application to practice.

item.title: First MA Placement Reflection
item.description:
tags: [] Placeholder for reflection on first MA Social Work placement to be added in approximately 18 months.

This reflection will document my experiences, learning outcomes, and professional growth during my first MA placement.
